Title: Prepare v0.1.0-alpha.1 pre-release notes
Description: Honest alpha notes exist in docs/release-notes/v0.1.0-alpha.1.md: Windows mixer fallback works, BrowserGain depends on site/browser support, ObserveOnly sources are visible but not directly controlled.

Title: Package tester build for v0.1.0-alpha.1
Description: tools/package-tester.ps1 now regenerates the tester folder and StreamVolumeGuardHub-Tester-v0.1.0-alpha.1.zip. Manual clean-folder launch validation is still required before publishing.

Title: Validate YouTube fallback behavior
Description: Confirm YouTube can move through Brave/Chrome/Firefox WindowsSessionVolume when BrowserGain remains ObserveOnly.

Title: Validate TikTok fallback behavior
Description: Confirm TikTok is classified honestly and moves through the browser Windows mixer fallback when direct BrowserGain is unavailable.

Title: Validate Spotify Web BrowserGain path
Description: Run Spotify Web alone long enough to verify whether BrowserGain reaches locked state or falls back honestly.

Title: Add local diagnostic export
Description: Create an explicit local diagnostic export with sanitized logs, source snapshots, config summary, versions, and no telemetry.

Title: Improve browser-source diagnostics in reports
Description: Make copied reports show calibrationState, captureSignalState, measuredRmsDb, appliedGainDb, and skipped/no-signal reasons clearly.

Title: Document OBS manual calibration limits
Description: Keep OBS as a manual visual validation path and avoid claiming automatic access to OBS meters or scenes.

Title: Review labels and issue templates before public push
Description: Verify labels.md, issue templates, PR template, project board fields, and README links before pushing.

Title: Split large desktop UI responsibilities later
Description: Plan a focused split for MainWindow code only after V1 test flow is stable and covered.

Title: Study OBS plugin or VST direction
Description: Compare an OBS plugin, VST, and desktop-only model after V1 proves the local Windows workflow.
